examples: He has carried out a partial cabinet reshuffle.
There's been a major reshuffle of the cabinet to bring in new blood.
The prime minister told reporters this morning that he plans to reshuffle his entire cabinet.
Meanwhile, India's Home Minister Palaniappan Chidambaram has been appointed as the new finance minister in a cabinet reshuffle.
The reshuffle comes as Australia heads for a general election scheduled for 14 September.
